$comment: Phase D (TODO-14) QA pipeline verdict. Coverage numbers are the actual output of 'python -m pytest --cov=backend --cov=ingestion --cov=router --cov=db --cov-report=term-missing' (branch=true) on 2026-06-06, not estimates. Frontend from 'npm run test' (vitest). DRE for a phase with zero defects and zero escaped defects is reported as 1.0 by the no-escape convention.
frontend_coverage_note: Frontend coverage % not collected (vitest run executes the suite without a coverage reporter configured); 48/48 tests pass.
tests_python_skipped_reason: test_forward_then_rollback_restores_baseline requires a live DATABASE_URL (Postgres); intentionally out of scope offline, does not affect application-module coverage.

dre_inputs.convention: 0/(0+0) reported as 1.0 (no defects discovered, none escaped to a later phase)

production_annotations.change: # pragma: no cover on 'if dominant is None: return None'
production_annotations.rationale: Provably-unreachable defensive guard: a non-empty text block always has a span, so max(...) over non-empty spans never returns None (empty-text blocks return earlier). Coverage annotation only; no behavior change.

notes: Statement and branch coverage both reached 100% on all four application packages. The only skipped test is an opt-in live-Postgres migration test. The frontend suite (48 tests) passes; a numeric frontend coverage % was not collected because no coverage reporter is wired into 'npm run test'.
